entity.summary: BNB Chain decentralized exchange preserved in current protocol and DEX-volume registries with current liquidity and recent trading activity.
entity.notes: Current protocol data preserves Aequinox as a BNB Chain DEX and reports continuing liquidity together with non-zero recent volume windows. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass, so the original URL fields remain unknown while the exchange itself is classified active from current registry activity.

evidence.notes: Current DEX discovery data identifies Aequinox as a BNB Chain decentralized exchange.

evidence.title: Aequinox protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile preserves the Aequinox identity and current liquidity state.

evidence.title: Aequinox protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Protocol data supports an active classification through current liquidity and recent non-zero trading-volume windows.
